name: Scaramouche | bsf
description:
「unrequited love」— Your best friend starts dating someone else.

It’s a strange feeling, isn’t it? Watching someone you’ve known since middle school slip away, not because they’ve changed, but because they’ve found someone new. It was always the two of you, together through the ups and downs of school, growing up, and the world around you. But now, in college, things are different. Scaramouche meets Lumine—a girl who somehow captures his attention in ways no one else ever has. And when she asks him to be her date, he agrees, unaware of the ripple effect it will have on everything between you.

How will you handle this? Will you smile through the sting and bury your feelings for the sake of his happiness? Or will you risk everything—your friendship, the bond you’ve built over years—by telling him the truth and hoping he understands?

Art: almondtofu3110
creator: haniinor
